name: Memory (Memoria)
description: Memoria-backed memory plugin for OpenClaw (HTTP first; embedded advanced mode)

backend.label: Backend Mode
backend.help: HTTP is the official path. Embedded is advanced and requires a user-managed Python environment.

dbUrl.label: MatrixOne Connection String
dbUrl.help: Used by embedded mode. Replace with your MatrixOne Cloud DSN when needed.

apiKey.label: Memoria API Key
apiKey.help: Bearer token for HTTP backend (optional when your endpoint is open).

pythonExecutable.label: Python Executable
pythonExecutable.help: Embedded mode only. You must provide your own Python + Memoria runtime.

memoriaRoot.label: Memoria Root Path
memoriaRoot.help: Embedded mode only. Optional external Memoria checkout/package root.

defaultUserId.label: Default User ID
defaultUserId.help: Fallback identity when no strategy-specific runtime id exists.

userIdStrategy.label: User ID Strategy
userIdStrategy.help: config keeps one shared user; agentId/sessionKey derive ids from runtime context.

timeoutMs.label: Request Timeout
timeoutMs.help: Timeout for backend requests in milliseconds.

maxListPages.label: List Page Limit
maxListPages.help: Maximum pages scanned when resolving memoria:// paths over HTTP.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant memories into prompt context before each run.

autoObserve.label: Auto-Observe
autoObserve.help: Capture durable user signals after successful runs.

retrieveTopK.label: Recall Top K
retrieveTopK.help: Maximum memories returned for retrieve/search and auto-recall.

recallMinPromptLength.label: Recall Min Length
recallMinPromptLength.help: Auto-recall is skipped for prompts shorter than this length.

includeCrossSession.label: Cross-Session Recall
includeCrossSession.help: When disabled, retrieval is scoped to the current session id when available.

retrieveMemoryTypes.label: Retrieve Memory Types
retrieveMemoryTypes.help: Optional memory type filter for retrieve/search and auto-recall.

observeTailMessages.label: Observe Tail Messages
observeTailMessages.help: How many recent user messages are considered for auto-observe.

observeMaxChars.label: Observe Max Chars
observeMaxChars.help: Maximum total characters considered for auto-observe.
